'''âzh-w-k''' ('''kazhawak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lilt|lilt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lilt|lilt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| kazhawak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhawak|thizhawak]] || [[word:jizhawak|jizhawak]] || [[word:shizhawak|shizhawak]] || [[word:kizhawak|kizhawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhawak|thuthuzhawak]] || [[word:jujuzhawak|jujuzhawak]] || [[word:shushuzhawak|shushuzhawak]] || [[word:kukuzhawak|kukuzhawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhawak|thuzhawak]] || [[word:juzhawak|juzhawak]] || [[word:shuzhawak|shuzhawak]] || [[word:kuzhawak|kuzhawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhawak|thuzhawak]] || [[word:juzhawak|juzhawak]] || [[word:shuzhawak|shuzhawak]] || [[word:kuzhawak|kuzhawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhawak|thezhawak]] || [[word:jezhawak|jezhawak]] || [[word:shezhawak|shezhawak]] || [[word:kezhawak|kezhawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhawak|thothozhawak]] || [[word:jojozhawak|jojozhawak]] || [[word:shoshozhawak|shoshozhawak]] || [[word:kokozhawak|kokozhawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhawak|thozhawak]] || [[word:jozhawak|jozhawak]] || [[word:shozhawak|shozhawak]] || [[word:kozhawak|kozhawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhawak|thozhawak]] || [[word:jozhawak|jozhawak]] || [[word:shozhawak|shozhawak]] || [[word:kozhawak|kozhawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhawak|thĂŠzhawak]] || [[word:jĂŠzhawak|jĂŠzhawak]] || [[word:shĂŠzhawak|shĂŠzhawak]] || [[word:kĂŠzhawak|kĂŠzhawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhawak|thathazhawak]] || [[word:jajazhawak|jajazhawak]] || [[word:shashazhawak|shashazhawak]] || [[word:kakazhawak|kakazhawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhawak|thazhawak]] || [[word:jazhawak|jazhawak]] || [[word:shazhawak|shazhawak]] || [[word:kazhawak|kazhawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhawak|thazhawak]] || [[word:jazhawak|jazhawak]] || [[word:shazhawak|shazhawak]] || [[word:kazhawak|kazhawak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhawak|shazhawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhawak|goshazhawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhawak|gokishazhawak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhawaknĂŒ|shazhawaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawaknknĂŒ|goshazhawaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawaknĂŒ|gokishazhawaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhawakshĂ«|shazhawakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkshĂ«|goshazhawaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhawakshĂ«|gokishazhawakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawakro|shazhawakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkro|goshazhawaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawakro|gokishazhawakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawakmu|shazhawakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkmu|goshazhawaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawakmu|gokishazhawakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhawaksher|shazhawaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhawaknksher|goshazhawaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhawaksher|gokishazhawaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhawakng|shazhawakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkng|goshazhawaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhawakng|gokishazhawakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhawakya|shazhawakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkya|goshazhawaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhawakya|gokishazhawakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhawakyam|shazhawakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkyam|goshazhawaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhawakyam|gokishazhawakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhawaknĂŒshĂ«|shazhawaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhawaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhawaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhawaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhawaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawaknĂŒro|shazhawaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawaknknĂŒro|goshazhawaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawaknĂŒro|gokishazhawaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawaknĂŒmu|shazhawaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawaknknĂŒmu|goshazhawaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawaknĂŒmu|gokishazhawaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhawakshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhawakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhawaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhawakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawakshĂ«ro|shazhawakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkshĂ«ro|goshazhawaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawakshĂ«ro|gokishazhawakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawakshĂ«mu|shazhawakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkshĂ«mu|goshazhawaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawakshĂ«mu|gokishazhawakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhawakronĂŒ|shazhawakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkronĂŒ|goshazhawaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawakronĂŒ|gokishazhawakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhawakroshĂ«|shazhawakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkroshĂ«|goshazhawaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhawakroshĂ«|gokishazhawakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawakromu|shazhawakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkromu|goshazhawaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawakromu|gokishazhawakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhawakmunĂŒ|shazhawakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkmunĂŒ|goshazhawaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawakmunĂŒ|gokishazhawakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhawakmushĂ«|shazhawakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkmushĂ«|goshazhawaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhawakmushĂ«|gokishazhawakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawakmuro|shazhawakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawaknkmuro|goshazhawaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawakmuro|gokishazhawakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
